description: Priority tiers for agent work flows. Tier 1 is fastest path, Tier 3 requires human review.

tiers.name: Auto-Execute
tiers.description: Changes that can be made and PR'd without human review of the plan
examples: Documentation-only changes within a single repo
Adding a new test for existing behavior

tiers.name: Plan-Then-Execute
tiers.description: Changes that need a generated plan reviewed before execution
examples: New feature implementation within one repo
Adding a new provider to a slot (e.g., new Vault provider)

tiers.name: Architecture Review
tiers.description: Changes that affect contracts, invariants, or cross-repo boundaries
examples: Adding a new Node to the Grid
